[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A close-up portrait shows a person with short dark hair resting their hand near their face while looking to the side against a plain light background.

Main Subject:
The main focus is a single person shown from the shoulders up, with short, straight dark hair. Their right hand is raised near their mouth area with the fingers curled, and their gaze is directed to the right of the frame. A small mole is visible on the side of their neck.

Setting:
The background is a simple, light-colored wall or backdrop with no clear details. The scene appears indoors due to the clean, studio-like backdrop.

Visual Details:
The person wears a white shirt with a dark bow tie and dark suspenders or straps over the shoulders. They are lit with soft, even lighting, creating gentle shadows under the hair and around the face. The camera angle is slightly side-on, emphasizing the profile view and the hand gesture. A small circular pendant or button-like detail is visible near the lower part of the bow tie area. In the top-left corner, a green geometric shape is partially visible.

Visible Text:
No important visible text detected.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a close-up, side-profile view of a person in a white shirt with a bow tie and dark suspenders. They hold their hand near their face and look off to the right against a plain light background.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text found in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- No visible UI text, captions, labels, or other readable characters detected.

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to be a photo with no legible text.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
